title: Cannvent application experience
summary: Design and development of the product-facing Cannvent application: a dedicated interface component translating the brand into functional software rather than a marketing website alone.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: System and product-definition responsibility: Design and development of the product-facing Cannvent application: a dedicated interface component translating the brand into functional software rather than a marketing website alone.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: Design and development of the product-facing Cannvent application: a dedicated interface component translating the brand into functional software rather than a marketing website alone.
